creator: adam.strohl-fbsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
Counter to my previous comment, building from latest clean ports directly and only enabling this checkbox in make config (leave all other defaults) does NOT work.

So the port itself is broken in terms of this feature.  It will build and run, but not work correctly.

It is not poudriere specific, doing 'make build install' via /usr/ports/www/nginx shows the issue too.
